featureName: Bearer Auth Scope Claim & RequireScope Middleware (Spec 044 Amendment)

scenarios.title: PASETO scope claim round-trips through mint → parse
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Unit roundtrip proves IssueToken sets the PASETO scope claim and VerifyAndParse parses it back to []string equality; signature stability is asserted for both scoped and legacy shapes.

scenarios.title: Legacy spec-044 token yields Scopes: nil
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live router proves a legacy spec-044 token (no scope claim) flows through bearerAuthMiddleware with Session.Scopes == nil and no parse error.

scenarios.title: Parse-time regex catches malformed scope element
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Forged token with malformed scope element returns ErrScopeClaimMalformed; ParsedToken.Scopes is nil (NEVER wildcard).

scenarios.title: internal/auth/scopes.go registry is the single source of truth
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Registry test enumerates RegisteredScopeSurfaces and proves regex + extractor behavior for canonical and malformed inputs.

scenarios.title: bearerAuthMiddleware populates Session.Scopes end-to-end
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live router proves a scoped PASETO token populates Session.Scopes for downstream handlers.

scenarios.title: BS-001 — Scoped token accepted on wired endpoint
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live chi router composed with bearerAuthMiddleware + RequireScope passes a scoped request through to the handler with no rejection metric increment.

scenarios.title: BS-002 ADVERSARIAL — Legacy token rejected on wired endpoint
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live test proves legacy token yields exact 403 + body shape + counter delta 1 + structured WARN log; handler NOT invoked. Comment states: if getScopeClaim ever falls back to wildcard, this test MUST fail.

scenarios.title: BS-003 — Cross-scope replay rejected
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Token scoped to extension:bookmarks,history is rejected by RequireScope("admin:users") with counter labelled admin:users.

scenarios.title: BS-004 — Unwired endpoint remains backward compatible
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live router without RequireScope passes a legacy token through to the handler exactly as today; no scope metrics touched.

scenarios.title: BS-007 — Dev/test bypass + bootstrap bypass satisfy scope requirements
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live shared-token bypass + unit bootstrap bypass each pass through with auth_scope_check_bypassed_total increment.

scenarios.title: RequireScope panics at construction when required is empty
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: RequireScope() with zero args panics at construction time, NEVER at request time.

scenarios.title: RequireScope returns 500 when session is absent
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Misconfigured router (RequireScope without bearerAuthMiddleware) returns 500 middleware_misconfigured with no scope-rejection metric increment.

scenarios.title: BS-005 — Invalid scope name rejected at enrollment
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: CLI exits 2 with regex diagnostic; no token minted; legacy invocation (no --scope) still mints a spec-044-shape token.

scenarios.title: BS-006 — Unknown surface rejected unless --allow-unknown-surface
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Without escape hatch CLI exits 2; with escape hatch CLI mints + WARN log; repeatable --scope accumulates and does NOT split embedded commas.

scenarios.title: BS-008 — Rotation preserves scope with --prior-token
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Rotation preserves prior scopes via VerifyAndParse(<wire>); refuses preservation without --prior-token; accepts explicit replacement via --scope.

scenarios.title: BS-009 — Rotation can explicitly demote to no scope
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: --scope "" sentinel produces legacy token; mixed "" with non-empty exits 2 with diagnostic.

scenarios.title: auth inspect prints parsed claims
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Inspect exits 0 with JSON claims on success; exits 1 on verify failure with stderr message.

scenarios.title: ./smackerel.sh auth passthrough wrapper forwards args verbatim
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Live test stack proves the wrapper forwards --scope extension:bookmarks,history verbatim (embedded comma NOT split) and propagates exit codes.

scenarios.title: docs/Operations.md Scoped Token Enrollment subsection present
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Doc grep test proves subsection header + canonical command examples present; PII scan green.

scenarios.title: docs/API.md 403 scope_required response shape + wiring matrix present
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Doc grep test proves scope_required body shape and design §9 wiring matrix reproduced.
